title: Bloomy Modpack
description: A modpack for 1.20.1 that aims to enhance, but not destroy the vanilla experience.
body:
# What is the bloomy modpack?
The bloomy modpack is a modpack for 1.20.1 that aims to enhance, but not destroy the vanilla experience.

# How does the modpack achieve this?
The bloomy modpack achieves this by slowing down the gameplay using the [LevelZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/levelz) mod (by Globox1997), while expanding on the world and enhancing the player experience using mods like [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) (by jeseibel) , [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) (by Forstride and Adubbz) and [Additional Structures](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/additional-structures) (by 
XxRexRaptorxX), to create a unique vanilla-like experience. The mod also includes a bunch of optimization mods to create a non-bloated optimised experience for even lower range computers. Alongside this, it also includes custom mods that enhance the player experience even more and make it a truly unique experience.

# Disclaimer
None of the mods, shaders, datapacks or resourcepacks in this modpack have been made by the creator of this modpack*, all rights belong to their respective owners.

*exceptions apply:
- [Bloomy Experience](https://modrinth.com/mod/bloomy-experience) - (by me/toent)
- [Bloomy Wooden Tools Compatibility](https://modrinth.com/mod/bloomy-wooden-tools-compatibility) - (by me/toent)
- [Bloomy Settings Import](https://modrinth.com/mod/bloomy-settings-import) - (by me/toent)
